Book Club: The Next Chapter (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $17,581,565Details
International Box Office $11,540,063
Worldwide Box Office $29,121,628
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,030,070
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $926,256
Total $1,956,326
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Our four best friends take their book club to Italy for the fun girls trip they never had. When things go off the rails and secrets are revealed, their relaxing vacation turns into a once-in-a-lifetime cross-country adventure.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$6,677,580 (38.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.63 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:60.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,508 opening theaters/3,513 max. theaters, 2.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $19,220,796

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: May 12th, 2023 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: May 10th, 2023 (Wide), released as Book Club 2: The Next Chapter (France)
May 11th, 2023 (Wide) (Peru)
May 11th, 2023 (Wide) (Chile)
May 11th, 2023 (Wide) (Venezuela)
May 11th, 2023 (Wide) (Croatia)
Video Release: May 30th, 2023 by Universal 1440 Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some strong language and suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2778 (cert #54118), 4/12/2023)
Running Time: 107 minutes
Franchise: Book Club
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Filming location (country): Italy
Geographical setting: Italy
Plot point: Autumn Years, Romance
Social setting: Vacation
Subgenre: Buddy Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Fifth Season, Apartment Story, Makeready, Focus Features
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
